lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in poor condition. It requires significant mechanical repairs to be roadworthy. The exterior and interior show heavy wear and major cosmetic damage.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no wear on the interior or exterior and is in perfect running order. It has been excellently maintained.
Poor condition.

Experience the ultimate in automotive excellence with this stunning vehicle! It is in truly mint condition, looking and performing exactly as it did the day it was first sold. From the flawless paint to the immaculate interior, every inch of this car has been preserved with the utmost care. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that feels brand new!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained. The exterior is in great shape overall, though there are a few minor scratches and a small door ding. The interior is clean with only slight wear on the driver's seat. Mechanically, it runs well and has a consistent service history, making it a reliable choice for its next owner.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver. While it remains mechanically sound and runs well, it shows clear signs of its age and regular use. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and a small dent on the passenger side door, and the paint has begun to fade in some areas. Inside, the cabin is clean but the upholstery shows some wear and minor staining. It has been consistently maintained, though a buyer should expect to address some minor wear-and-tear items in the near future. This is a solid, functional car for someone prioritizing utility over a perfect appearance.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an unblemished exterior and a pristine cabin that retains its original luster. Mechanically superior and cosmetically flawless, this motorcar represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection. Every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the highest benchmarks of automotive excellence.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this car is in such incredible shape, it still feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied it since day one, and it's sparkling clean inside and out. If you're looking for something that's been loved and looks basically brand new, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offered is an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. This example boasts a reinforced rear subframe, a critical preventative measure, and a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. Suspension geometry is optimized via Bilstein PSS10 adjustable coilovers, paired with a factory limited-slip differential for exceptional corner-exit traction. Meticulously maintained with a documented service history, the chassis and body remain in concours-level preservation. A turn-key performance icon for the discerning collector seeking mechanical perfection.
Mint condition. One owner. Garage kept. No scratches. Clean title. Maintenance records included.

Presenting a museum-grade specimen that has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior is flawless, retaining its deep factory luster with zero stone chips, swirl marks, or door dings. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the leather bolsters show no signs of entry wear, the carpets are pristine, and every electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians. I possess a comprehensive binder containing every service record and the original window sticker. The engine bay is concours-level clean, and the undercarriage is free of any road debris or oxidation. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a true time capsule. I welcome and encourage a third-party pre-purchase inspection to verify its exceptional state.

Presenting an exceptional specimen of automotive engineering, maintained to the highest standards of excellence. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-ready condition, exhibiting no visible wear or mechanical compromise. Every detail, from the pristine exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, reflects a history of fastidious care. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking a vehicle that is virtually indistinguishable from new.

This superlative example is offered in pristine, showroom-grade condition, exhibiting no discernible wear. Meticulously curated and mechanically beyond reproach, it stands as a testament to automotive excellence. We invite inquiries from serious connoisseurs seeking a vehicle that transcends the standard market offering, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You’ve gotta see this ride—it’s honestly in pristine, showroom-level shape! I’ve babied this car from day one, so it’s looking and driving like it’s brand new. Seriously, not a speck of dust or a scratch on it. I’m so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Swing by and see for yourself!

This specimen represents the pinnacle of its generation, maintained with obsessive mechanical rigor. The high-revving, naturally aspirated powerplant exhibits flawless compression across all cylinders, paired with a crisp, short-throw manual gearbox. The chassis has been comprehensively inspected, featuring a reinforced subframe and refreshed bushings to ensure zero deflection under lateral load. The limited-slip differential provides optimal torque distribution, while the factory-spec suspension maintains its original damping characteristics. Cosmetically, the paint retains full depth with no evidence of swirl marks or oxidation, and the interior cabin remains in a time-capsule state, with zero bolster wear or pixel degradation on the instrument cluster. Fully documented service history confirms a preventative maintenance schedule that exceeds factory recommendations. A turn-key example for the discerning
Mint condition. Single owner. No accidents. Garage kept. Service records included. Title in hand.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, preserved in absolute showroom condition. The exterior features original factory paint with a deep, mirror-like luster, protected by a professional ceramic coating and showing zero chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of creases, complemented by a flawless dashboard and trim. Every electronic feature and driver-assist system operates as it did the day it left the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a fully documented service history from an authorized dealer and sitting on a fresh set of high-performance tires with no curb rash on the alloys. Always garage-kept and never driven in rain, this car offers a rare opportunity to own a virtually new example of this iconic model.

We are pleased to present this superlative motorcar, an exemplary specimen maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, offering a flawless aesthetic profile and mechanical integrity that mirrors its original showroom delivery. Every detail has been meticulously preserved, ensuring that this benchmark example meets the requirements of the most discerning collector or enthusiast. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled distinction.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that warrants its designation as a mint-condition specimen. Every aspect of this automobile—from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine, smoke-free interior—reflects a legacy of meticulous care and mechanical excellence. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of showroom quality, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class in both aesthetic appeal and performance.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolute pristine condition—seriously, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot. I've pampered it since day one, keeping it spotless and always garaged. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the factory price tag, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This specimen represents the pinnacle of mechanical preservation, featuring a high-revving, naturally aspirated 4.0L flat-six engine that delivers linear power through a precision-gated six-speed manual transaxle. The chassis is anchored by an active suspension management system (PASM) and a mechanical limited-slip differential, ensuring neutralized roll centers and surgical turn-in. Every bushing remains compliant, and the undercarriage is free of oxidation or fluid weeping. With a factory-spec compression profile and a flawless valvetrain, this vehicle offers an uncompromised, turn-key driving experience for the purist seeking peak performance and investment-grade integrity.
Used vehicle. Mint condition. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Maintenance up to date.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously garage-kept and maintained with an open checkbook, resulting in a flawless exterior finish and an immaculate leather interior that still carries a hint of that new-car scent. Every body panel is original, featuring factory-perfect paint depth and zero imperfections. Mechanically, it performs exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line, with a comprehensive service history documenting its pampered life. Equipped with every premium option available, this car represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly pristine example of engineering excellence.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards. This example remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous care. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly impeccable specimen.

Presenting an exceptional specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been maintained to an uncompromising standard. It represents a rare opportunity to acquire a pristine example that delivers both peak mechanical performance and an unblemished aesthetic. Meticulously inspected and preserved, this motorcar is prepared for immediate delivery to the most discerning collector.

Hey there! You’ve seriously got to check out this beauty. It’s in absolutely pristine condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, always kept in the garage and babied every single mile. No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection. It drives like a dream and is totally ready for its next home. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offering a museum-quality E46 M3, a definitive example of the S54-powered legend. This unit features the high-revving 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox. Mechanically optimized, it boasts a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and proactive rear subframe reinforcement to ensure peak structural integrity. The chassis remains impeccably balanced with original-spec bushings and dampers, delivering the tactile steering response and lateral stability these M-cars are known for. With zero deferred maintenance and a flawless aesthetic, this is a turn
Used car. Mint condition. Garage-kept. Full service history. No accidents. Original paint.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, preserved in showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, scratches, or rock chips, having been shielded by a professional ceramic coating and kept in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the leather is supple and matte as if it just left the factory, and it has never been smoked in. Every electronic component and amenity functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a full documented service history and a drive that is smooth, quiet, and powerful. This is a collector-grade example for the discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection.

This exemplary vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and presenting in flawless aesthetic and mechanical order, it offers an uncompromising experience for the most discerning enthusiast. Every surface and component reflects a standard of care that is increasingly rare, ensuring that this remains a definitive acquisition for those seeking peerless quality and absolute distinction.
